cells.rationale: Operator reassignment: worker_provider=gpt launched the opus/xhigh task with KEEPER_WRAPPED_CELL but left its resolved cell native-only, so wrapped-guard correctly denied every edit. No source was touched. Pinning an explicit wrapped GPT cell restores a coherent launch contract.
Prevent the same native-cell/wrapped-marker mismatch on the remaining task while the GPT provider pin is active; preserve xhigh effort on an explicit wrapped GPT cell.
